description: Configuration schema for RivetKit registry. This is typically passed to the setup() function.

use.description: Actor definitions. Keys are actor names, values are actor definitions.

maxIncomingMessageSize.description: Maximum size of incoming WebSocket messages in bytes. Default: 65536

maxOutgoingMessageSize.description: Maximum size of outgoing WebSocket messages in bytes. Default: 1048576

noWelcome.description: Disable the welcome message on startup. Default: false

endpoint.description: Endpoint URL to connect to Rivet Engine. Supports URL auth syntax: https://namespace:token@api.rivet.dev. Can also be set via RIVET_ENDPOINT environment variable.

token.description: Authentication token for Rivet Engine. Can also be set via RIVET_TOKEN environment variable.

namespace.description: Namespace to use. Default: 'default'. Can also be set via RIVET_NAMESPACE environment variable.

headers.description: Additional headers to include in requests to Rivet Engine.

staticDir.description: Directory to serve static files from. When set, registry.start() serves static files alongside the actor API.

httpBasePath.description: Base path for the local RivetKit API. Default: '/'

httpPort.description: Port to run the local HTTP server on. Default: 6421

httpHost.description: Host to bind the local HTTP server to.

inspector.description: Inspector configuration for debugging and development.

enabled.description: Whether to enable the Rivet Inspector. Defaults to true in development mode.

token.description: Token used to access the Inspector.

defaultEndpoint.description: Default RivetKit server endpoint for Rivet Inspector to connect to.

startEngine.description: Starts the full Rust engine process locally. Default: false

engineVersion.description: Version of the local engine package to use. Defaults to the current RivetKit version.

configurePool.description: Automatically configure serverless runners in the engine.

url.description: URL of the serverless platform to configure runners.

headers.description: Headers to include in requests to the serverless platform.

requestLifespan.description: Maximum lifespan of a request in seconds.

drainGracePeriod.description: Grace period before the serverless request is forcibly closed, in seconds.

metadata.description: Additional metadata to pass to the serverless platform.

metadataPollInterval.description: Interval in milliseconds between metadata polls from the engine. Defaults to 10000 milliseconds (10 seconds).

drainOnVersionUpgrade.description: Drain runners when a new version is deployed. Defaults to true.

basePath.description: Base path for serverless API routes. Default: '/api/rivet'

publicEndpoint.description: The endpoint that clients should connect to. Supports URL auth syntax: https://namespace:token@api.rivet.dev

publicToken.description: Token that clients should use when connecting via the public endpoint.

totalSlots.description: Total number of actor slots available. Default: 100000

poolName.description: Name of this envoy pool. Default: 'default'

envoyKey.description: Deprecated. Authentication key for the envoy.

version.description: Version number of this envoy. Default: 1

title: RivetKit Registry Configuration
